commands.repair_reason: Human/contributor follow-up is needed because the PR has protected maintainer handling, missing contributor proof, and trust-boundary defects that must be fixed and re-proven before merge.; Needs attention: The diff introduces concrete trust-boundary issues in the Control UI verdict display and installed-skill verification registry resolution.; Review finding: [P1] Require both verdict fields before showing clean —... (sha=0632c9ad5221f4343dfbeac22ac21702f6d788df)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds ClawHub skill verification/card fetch support, installed-origin trust metadata, `openclaw skills verify`, `skills.securityVerdicts` and `skills.skillCard` gateway methods, Control UI verdict/card rendering, generated protocol models, docs, and tests.

PR surface: Source +1662, Tests +1939, Docs +31, Other +80. Total +3712 across 30 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR findings: source inspection at the current head shows the UI fail-open predicate and the CLI origin/lock registry mismatch path. I did not run the UI because this is a read-only review and the linked proof media is inaccessible.
commands.review_followup: Human/contributor follow-up is needed because the PR has protected maintainer handling, missing contributor proof, and trust-boundary defects that must be fixed and re-proven before merge.

target.title: Add ClawHub skill verification and trust surfaces
target.body:
## Summary
- adds `openclaw skills verify <slug>` backed by ClawHub `/verify`, with `--version`, `--tag`, `--card`, shared/global workspace, and installed/uninstalled target resolution
- resolves installed ClawHub skills from installer-owned lock/origin metadata and fails closed on malformed trust envelopes/card downloads
- adds `skills.securityVerdicts` and `skills.skillCard` gateway methods so Control UI can show a top-level ClawHub verdict plus a lazy local `skill-card.md` tab
- keeps verdict fetching bulk/narrow: one passive unauthenticated request for linked installs, no card data and no full scanner payload; detailed reports link out to ClawHub

## Cross-repo dependency
- depends on ClawHub bulk verdict endpoint in openclaw/clawhub#2404: `POST /api/v1/skills/-/security-verdicts`
- OpenClaw intentionally does not fall back to N per-skill requests; pre-deploy/old ClawHub endpoints can report verdicts unavailable until the ClawHub PR ships

## Linear
- CLAW-179 root
- CLAW-180, CLAW-181, CLAW-182, CLAW-183, CLAW-184
- CLAW-190, CLAW-191, CLAW-192, CLAW-193
- CLAW-186 tracks the ClawHub CLI cleanup to remove its redundant `--json` flag

## Tests
- `CI=true pnpm test src/infra/clawhub.test.ts src/agents/skills-clawhub.test.ts src/cli/skills-cli.commands.test.ts src/cli/skills-cli.verify.test.ts -- --reporter=dot`
- `CI=true pnpm check:changed`
- `CI=true pnpm format:docs:check`
- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm test src/agents/skills-status.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/skills.clawhub.test.ts src/infra/clawhub.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods-list.test.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/skills.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/skills.test.ts`
- `pnpm tsgo:core`
- `pnpm tsgo:test:src`
- `pnpm tsgo:test:ui`
- `pnpm check:changed`
- `pnpm ui:build`
- `pnpm protocol:check`
- `pnpm ui:i18n:check`

## UI proof
Skills list verdict:

![Skills list verdict](https://uploads.linear.app/f62397ba-7118-4506-b4a8-119d64e590a4/85031632-42a3-4397-bc43-038a8e25ae04/f6ccf001-8a5b-4312-922e-400244e61501)

Verdict overview and full-report link:

![Verdict overview](https://uploads.linear.app/f62397ba-7118-4506-b4a8-119d64e590a4/60c1126e-248b-4de9-b1cb-f881abb94a9b/29131f94-67d2-4b28-9cd0-7c119bf0e632)

Local Skill Card tab:

![Skill Card tab](https://uploads.linear.app/f62397ba-7118-4506-b4a8-119d64e590a4/c1c30c79-dc1a-4dee-92ab-6f8c2d874ebb/d950efc8-55ea-4a33-9075-9cc4d6a41018)

Local screenshot copies:
- skills list: `/tmp/openclaw-claw-192-skills-list.png`
- verdict overview: `/tmp/openclaw-claw-192-verdict-overview.png`
- skill card tab: `/tmp/openclaw-claw-192-skill-card-tab.png`

## Review
- autoreview accepted findings fixed: verified card URL binding, missing card metadata, card byte cap, release-owned changelog removal, fail-closed malformed decisions, lockfile-corroborated installed origin metadata, method reachability, token-safe passive verdict fetches, lazy/symlink-safe local card reads, provenance install-dir/registry checks, non-blocking verdict refresh, and stale Skill Card cache guards
- final read-only subagent review: no blocking findings after fixes
- final autoreview remaining finding rejected as an expected cross-repo dependency on openclaw/clawhub#2404, verified in that ClawHub branch
